scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields from gold standard: name, type, base, summary, description, containers, resources with oci-image. Includes assumes, platforms concept addressed via base. Comprehensive example with valid structure.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'optional: true' field on relations is not a standard charmcraft.yaml field — charmcraft relations don't have an 'optional' key. This appears to be fabricated guidance. Also 'platforms' key is missing from the example (required per gold standard).
